{"society_power": 7.4, "state_power": 7.2, "society_change": 0.3, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Babri Masjid demolition; Mandal mobilization; 1991 liberalization", "reasoning": "Society power rose modestly as OBC/Dalit mobilization, Hindutva mass movements, and the 73rd/74th Amendments expanded participation\u2014though much of this was sectarian and majoritarian rather than pluralistic. State power fell as Congress dominance fragmented, the License Raj was dismantled, fiscal crisis exposed weakness, and the Babri demolition and communal riots showed the state losing its monopoly on force, only partly offset by coercive victories in Punjab."}
